title: Mahabharata: The Dice Game
description: The fateful dice game where Yudhishthira gambles away his kingdom, his brothers, and his wife Draupadi.
introduction: The fateful dice game where Yudhishthira gambles away his kingdom, his brothers, and his wife Draupadi.

translation.text: The king Yudhishthira, son of Dharma, desires to play at dice.
